zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Cherleton 3rd Baron Cherleton of Powis於大約1336年出生在英國威爾斯時，他的父親John Cherleton 2nd Baron Cherleton of Powis30歲，母親Maud Mortimer22歲。他於大約1360年與Joan II Stafford在英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1374年7月13日在英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾波維斯 卡素享年39歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯卡迪甘史爾斯特拉塔 福洛利達。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Cherleton 3rd Baron Cherleton of Powis于大约1336年出生在英国威尔斯时，他的父亲John Cherleton 2nd Baron Cherleton of Powis30岁，母亲Maud Mortimer22岁。他于大约1360年与Joan II Stafford在英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1374年7月13日在英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾波維斯 卡素享年39岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯卡迪甘史爾斯特拉塔 福洛利達。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cherleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Charlton
meanings: English (Northumberland and Durham): habitational name from North Charlton or Charlton near Bellingham (both Northumberland) or from any of the many other places so named (there are over ninety examples in England), from Old English Ceorlatūn ‘settlement (Old English tūn) of the peasants’. Old English ceorl denoted originally a free peasant of the lowest rank, later (but probably already before the Norman conquest) a tenant in pure villeinage, a serf or bondsman.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John de Cherleton 3rd Baron Cherleton of Powis was born about 1336, in Wales, United Kingdom, his father, John Cherleton 2nd Baron Cherleton of Powis, was 30 and his mother, Maud Mortimer, was 22. He married Joan II Stafford about 1360, in Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 13 July 1374, in Powis Castle, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 39, and was buried in Strata Florida, Cardiganshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Cherleton 3rd Baron Cherleton of Powis est né environ 1336, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Cherleton 2nd Baron Cherleton of Powis, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Maud Mortimer, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Joan II Stafford environ 1360, à Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 13 juillet 1374, à Powis Castle, Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterré à Strata Florida, Cardiganshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Cherleton 3rd Baron Cherleton of Powis um 1336 in Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Cherleton 2nd Baron Cherleton of Powis 30 und seine Mutter Maud Mortimer 22. Er hat um 1360 in Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom Joan II Stafford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 13. Juli 1374 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Powis Castle, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Strata Florida, Cardiganshire, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Cherleton 3rd Baron Cherleton of Powis è nato il circa 1336 nel Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Cherleton 2nd Baron Cherleton of Powis, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Maud Mortimer, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Joan II Stafford circa 1360, nel Montgomeryshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: John de Cherleton 3rd Baron Cherleton of Powisが約1336年にイギリスウェールズで生まれた時，父John Cherleton 2nd Baron Cherleton of Powisは30歳，母Maud Mortimerは22歳であった。約1360年にイギリスウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアでJoan II Staffordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1374年7月13日にイギリスウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアポウィス カストルで39歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズカーディガンシュアイアストラタ フロリダにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Cherleton 3rd Baron Cherleton of Powis(이)가 대략 1336년 영국 웨일스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Cherleton 2nd Baron Cherleton of Powis(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Mortimer(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1360년 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르에서 Joan II Stafford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1374년 7월 13일 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르 파위스 카스틀에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 카디건실르 스트라타 플로리다에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Cherleton 3rd Baron Cherleton of Powis nasceu aproximadamente 1336, em Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Cherleton 2nd Baron Cherleton of Powis, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Maud Mortimer, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan II Stafford aproximadamente 1360, em Montgomeryshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 13 de julho de 1374, em Powis Castle, Montgomeryshire, Gales, United Kingdom, com 39 anos, e foi sepultado em Strata Florida, Cardiganshire, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Cherleton 3rd Baron Cherleton of Powis родился около 1336 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Cherleton 2nd Baron Cherleton of Powis было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Mortimer, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan II Stafford около 1360 г. в местности монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 13 июля 1374 г. в местности поуис кастл, монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 39 лет и был похоронен в местности страта флорида, кардиганьшир, Уэльс, Великобритания.

Se casó con Joan II Stafford aproximadamente 1360, en Montgomeryshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 13 de julio de 1374, en Powis Castle, Montgomeryshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultado en Strata Florida, Cardiganshire, Gales, Reino Unido.
